title: built-in theme pack
manager: Ship a starter set of named built-in themes — flowchart, 1950s flowchart, flowchart-symbols, Monokai, Penumbra — so users get good-looking diagrams by picking a name instead of hand-styling. Curated defaults are what make theming approachable; most users want to choose a look, not design one, and this seeds the choices (including the theme-sources research behind them).
